translations.### Call Directory Extension 電話辨識功能運作流程：: ### Call Directory Extension Call Identification Workflow:
translations.#### 1.為 iOS 專案加入 Call Directory Extensi: #### 1. Add Call Directory Extension to iOS Project
translations.#### 2.開始編寫 Call Directory Extension 相關程: #### 2. Start Writing Call Directory Extension Related Code
translations.#### 3.開始修改 Call Directory Extension 的程式: #### 3. Start Modifying the Call Directory Extension Code
translations.**addAllIdentificationPhoneNumbers** ：處理: **addAllIdentificationPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding all identification phone numbers (full addition)
translations.**addOrRemoveIncrementalBlockingPhoneNum: **addOrRemoveIncrementalBlockingPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding phone numbers to the blacklist (incremental method)
translations.**addOrRemoveIncrementalIdentificationPh: **addOrRemoveIncrementalIdentificationPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding call identification numbers (incremental method)
translations.**前面有提到，來電辨識的運作方式是要在本地維護一個辨識資料庫；再來就是重頭戲該: **As mentioned earlier, the call identification works by maintaining a local identification database; next is the main question: how to achieve this functionality?**
translations.**第一個問題是我們該如何判斷使用者的裝置支不支援Call Directory: **The first question is how to determine whether the user's device supports Call Directory Extension or if the "Call Blocking & Identification" setting is already enabled:**
translations.**那所謂的辨識資料、檔案該長怎樣？**\n\n: **What should the identification data and files look like?**
translations.1. **addAllBlockingPhoneNumbers**: Handl:
1. **addAllBlockingPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding blacklist numbers (full addition)

2. **addOrRemoveIncrementalBlockingPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding phone numbers to the blacklist (incremental method)

3. **addAllIdentificationPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding all identification phone numbers (full addition)

4. **addOrRemoveIncrementalIdentificationPhoneNumbers**: Handles adding call identification numbers (incremental method)
translations.1. If the app keeps loading or cannot id:
1. If the app keeps loading or cannot identify numbers after enabling it in "Settings" > "Phone" > "Call Blocking & Identification," first check if the numbers are correct, verify the locally maintained .json data, and confirm whether reloading the extension was successful. You can also try restarting the device. If the issue persists, select the Call Directory Extension scheme build to check for error messages.

2. The **most challenging part of this feature is not the programming but guiding users to manually enable the setting**. For specific methods and guidance, you can refer to whoscall:
translations.1. In Taiwan, landline and mobile number:
1. In Taiwan, landline and mobile numbers must replace the leading 0 with 886: for example, 0255667788 -> 886255667788

2. The phone number format must be a string composed of digits only, without any symbols such as "-", ",", "#" and so on.

3. For landline numbers that include an **extension** to be identified, simply append it directly without any symbols: for example, 0255667788,0718 -> 8862556677880718

4. To convert the standard iOS phone number format into a format accepted by the identification database, you can refer to the following two replacement methods:
translations.1. Messaging apps and office communicati:
1. Messaging apps and office communication software; within the app, you may have the other person’s contact, but their phone number is not actually saved in your phone’s contacts. This feature helps prevent missing calls from colleagues or even your boss by mistakenly treating them as unknown numbers.

2. Our site ([結婚吧](https://www.marry.com.tw){:target="_blank"}) or my private site ([591房屋交易](https://www.591.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}) uses forwarding numbers when users contact stores or landlords. The calls are routed through a forwarding center to the target phone. The general process is as follows:
translations.1. Phone **Outgoing** Caller ID Labeling:
1. Phone **Outgoing** Caller ID Labeling

2. Phone **Incoming Call** Identification Label

3. **Call History** Identification Label

4. Phone **Reject** Blacklist Setup
translations.1. Users must manually go to \"Settings\:
1. Users must manually go to "Settings" > "Phone" > "Call Blocking & Identification" to enable your app before use.

2. Only offline database recognition is supported (real-time incoming call information cannot be obtained to call APIs for lookup; the number-to-name mapping must be pre-written in the phone’s database).  
   **Therefore, Whoscall regularly pushes notifications asking users to open the app to update the call identification database.**

3. Quantity limit? Currently, no information is found. It likely depends on the user's phone storage with no specific limit; however, if the recognition or block list is large, it should be processed and written in batches!

4. Software limitation: iOS version must be ≥ 10
translations.> It's basically a dictionary structure,: > It's basically a dictionary structure, like: ["phone": "Wang Daming"]
translations.> Local files can use some Local DB (but: > Local files can use some Local DB (but the Extension must also be able to access it). Here, a .json file is directly stored on the device; **storing directly in UserDefaults is not recommended. It may be fine for testing or small data, but strongly discouraged for real applications!**
translations.iOS自幹 Whoscall 來電辨識、電話號碼標記 功能\n\n: iOS Homemade Whoscall Caller Identification and Phone Number Labeling Feature
translations.一直以來都是Whoscall的忠實用戶，從原本用Android手機時就有使用，能: I have always been a loyal Whoscall user, starting from when I used an Android phone. It could instantly display unknown caller information, allowing me to decide whether to answer right away. Later, when I switched to the Apple ecosystem, my first Apple phone was the iPhone 6 (iOS 9). Using Whoscall on it was very awkward because it couldn’t identify calls in real time; I had to copy the phone number and search in the app. Later, Whoscall offered a service to install the unknown caller database locally on the phone. Although this solved the real-time identification issue, it easily messed up your phone contacts!
translations.主 iOS 專案的程式就到這了！\n\n: The main iOS project's code ends here!
translations.但此做法會帶來ㄧ項不可避免的問題，就是電話號碼凌亂；無法辨識出是打給誰或是店家回: However, this approach brings an unavoidable issue: messy phone numbers. Users cannot identify who they are calling or who is calling back from a store. Using the call identification feature can greatly solve this problem and improve the user experience!
translations.使用以上方法通知Extension刷新，並取得執行結果。（這時候會呼叫執行Cal: Use the above method to notify the Extension to refresh and get the execution result. (At this point, the beginRequest in the Call Directory Extension will be called, please continue reading)
translations.使用者所撥打的電話都是轉接中心代表號(#分機)，不會知道真實的電話號碼；一方面是: The phone numbers dialed by users are all representative numbers of the call center (#extension), so the real phone numbers are not known. This both protects personal privacy and allows tracking how many people contact the business (to evaluate effectiveness). It can also identify where the call was made from (e.g., webpage shows #1234, app shows #5678). Additionally, free services can be promoted, with our side covering the phone communication costs.
translations.使用者需手動進入「設定」「電話」「通話封鎖與識別」打開您的APP才能使用\n: Users must manually go to "Settings" > "Phone" > "Call Blocking & Identification" to enable your app before use.
translations.僅能以離線資料庫方式辨識電話(無法即時取得來電資訊然後Call API查詢，僅能:
Only offline database recognition is supported (real-time incoming call information cannot be obtained to call APIs for lookup; the number-to-name mapping must be pre-written in the phone’s database).  
**Therefore, Whoscall regularly pushes notifications asking users to open the app to update the call identification database.**
translations.其實就是個Dictionary結構，如：[“電話”:”王大明”]\n\n: It's basically a dictionary structure, like: ["phone": "Wang Daming"]
translations.再來就是如流程，辨識資料已維護好；需要通知Call Directory Exte: Next, following the process, once the identification data is maintained, you need to notify the Call Directory Extension to refresh the data on the phone:
translations.到此為止就完成囉！實作方面非常簡單！\n\n: That's it! The implementation is very simple!
translations.可以看到在輸入電話、電話來電時能直接顯示辨識結果、通話記錄列表也不在亂糟糟ㄧ樣能: You can see that when entering a phone number or receiving a call, the identification result is displayed directly, and the call history list also shows the identification result clearly at the bottom.
translations.可順帶加入 Scheme 方便 Debug\n\n: You can also add a Scheme for easier debugging.
translations.台灣地區市話、手機都需去掉0以886代替：如 0255667788 -> 886: In Taiwan, landline and mobile numbers must replace the leading 0 with 886: for example, 0255667788 -> 886255667788
translations.因為敝站的資料不會到太多而且我的本地資料結構相當簡易，無法做到遞增；所以這邊 *: Because our site's data won't be too large and my local data structure is quite simple, incremental updates are not possible; therefore, **we will uniformly use a full replacement approach. If using incremental updates, you must delete the old data first (this step is very important, otherwise reloading the extension will fail!)**
translations.如果在「設定」「電話」「通話封鎖與識別」打開APP時一直轉或是打開後無法辨識號碼: If the app keeps loading or cannot identify numbers after enabling it in "Settings" > "Phone" > "Call Blocking & Identification," first check if the numbers are correct, verify the locally maintained .json data, and confirm whether reloading the extension was successful. You can also try restarting the device. If the issue persists, select the Call Directory Extension scheme build to check for error messages.
translations.存在本地的檔案可用一些Local DB(但Extension那邊也要能裝能用)，: Local files can use some Local DB (but the Extension must also be able to access it). Here, a .json file is directly stored on the device; **storing directly in UserDefaults is not recommended. It may be fine for testing or small data, but strongly discouraged for real applications!**
translations.將一般iOS電話格式轉換成辨識資料庫可接受格式可參考以下兩個取代方法：\n: To convert the standard iOS phone number format into a format accepted by the identification database, you can refer to the following two replacement methods:
translations.就只是一般的本地檔案維護，要注意的就是目錄需要在Extesion也能讀取的地方。: It's just regular local file maintenance; the key point is that the directory must be accessible from the Extension as well.
translations.市話電話如有包含要辨識到 **分機** ，直接接在後面即可不需帶任何符號：如 0: For landline numbers that include an **extension** to be identified, simply append it directly without any symbols: for example, 0255667788,0718 -> 8862556677880718
translations.很遺憾，您無法直接對Call Directory Extension進行呼叫寫入: Unfortunately, you cannot directly write data to the Call Directory Extension. Therefore, you need to maintain an additional corresponding structure, which the Call Directory Extension will then read to write into the identification database. The process is as follows:
translations.意旨我們需要多維護一個自己的資料庫文件，再讓Extenstion去讀取寫入到手機: This means we need to maintain our own database file and have the Extension read and write it to the phone.
translations.我們只要完成以上的Function實作即可，黑名單功能跟來電辨識方式原理都ㄧ樣這: We only need to complete the above function implementation. The blacklist feature works on the same principle as call identification, so it will not be further explained here.
translations.打開Call Directory Extension 目錄，找到底下已經幫你建立: Open the Call Directory Extension folder and find the pre-created file CallDirectoryHandler.swift.
translations.敝站( [結婚吧](https://www.marry.com.tw){:tar: Our site ([結婚吧](https://www.marry.com.tw){:target="_blank"}) or my private site ([591房屋交易](https://www.591.com.tw/){:target="_blank"}) uses forwarding numbers when users contact stores or landlords. The calls are routed through a forwarding center to the target phone. The general process is as follows:
translations.數量上限？目前沒查到資料，應該是依照使用者手機容量無特別上限；但是數量多得辨識清: Quantity limit? Currently, no information is found. It likely depends on the user's phone storage with no specific limit; however, if the recognition or block list is large, it should be processed and written in batches!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.目錄底下就會出現Call Directory Extension的資料夾及程式\: Under the directory, the Call Directory Extension folder and files will appear.
translations.直到 iOS 10+ 之後蘋果開放電話辨識功能(Call Directory E: It was not until iOS 10+ that Apple opened the Call Directory Extension permission to developers, allowing apps like whoscall to offer an experience comparable to the Android version, if not better (the Android version has many ads, which is understandable from a developer's perspective).
translations.能實作的方法只有 **beginRequest** 當要處理手機電話資料時的動作: The only method you can implement is **beginRequest**, which handles the phone number data. The default example has it set up for us, so there's usually no need to modify it:
translations.軟體限制：iOS 版本需 ≥ 10\n: Software limitation: iOS version must be ≥ 10
translations.這個功能 **最困難的點不是程式方面而是要引導使用者手動去設定打開** ，具體方: The **most challenging part of this feature is not the programming but guiding users to manually enable the setting**. For specific methods and guidance, you can refer to whoscall:
translations.通訊軟體、辦公室通訊軟體；在APP內你可能有對方的聯絡人，但實際並未將手機號碼加: Messaging apps and office communication software; within the app, you may have the other person’s contact, but their phone number is not actually saved in your phone’s contacts. This feature helps prevent missing calls from colleagues or even your boss by mistakenly treating them as unknown numbers.
translations.電話格式是純數字組合的字串，勿夾雜「-」、「,」、「#」…等符號\n: The phone number format must be a string composed of digits only, without any symbols such as "-", ",", "#" and so on.
translations.首先回到主 iOS 專案上\n\n: First, return to the main iOS project.
